title: A Quiet Place: Day One's Box Office Success Points to Franchise's Future Beyond Part 3
text: The prequel has earned $245 million globally against a $67 million budget, making it a massive box office hit despite being the lowest-grossing entry in the franchise. The movie's commercial performance demonstrates that audiences will support spinoffs and prequels exploring new characters and storylines within the established universe. Lupita Nyong'o's Sam and Joseph Quinn's Eric were compelling protagonists, establishing that other characters in different settings and stages of life are worth following beyond the Abbott family. The article notes the invasion occurred worldwide, yet all the stories have taken place in New York, suggesting untapped potential for stories set in different locations with fresh characters. Rather than concluding the franchise, A Quiet Place 3 can wrap up the Abbott family's arc while leaving the door open for future installments. Other characters like Emmett or Eric could anchor subsequent films, allowing the universe to continue expanding beyond the original trilogy.
